Our Story

Built on Expertise.
Driven by Purpose.

Two decades of chemical industry leadership, anchored in quality, innovation, and a commitment to a sustainable South Africa.

20+ Years in Industry
500+ Products Supplied
100% ESG Compliant
KZN Based & National
Our Story

Welcome to Apex Chemicals

Welcome to Apex Chemicals — your trusted partner in the world of chemicals and chemical solutions. Established with a commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability, we are a leading provider of a diverse range of chemical products, including oleo-chemicals, water treatment chemicals, and many more.

With decades of experience in the chemical industry, Apex Chemicals has cultivated a team of experts who are dedicated to researching, developing, and producing high-quality chemical products. Our expertise spans across multiple industries including mining, agriculture, manufacturing, personal care, and water treatment.

Our Headquarters

1 Lodestar Avenue, AECI Industrial Complex
Umbogintwini, 4126, KwaZulu-Natal

Our Direction

Vision & Mission

Our Vision

To be Africa's most trusted chemical solutions provider, leading the transition to sustainable industrial chemistry and setting new standards for quality, safety, and environmental responsibility.

Our Mission

To deliver premium chemical products and services that empower our clients to operate more efficiently, sustainably, and profitably — while continuously innovating to meet the evolving needs of South African industry.

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

The principles that guide every decision we make and every product we supply.

Quality

We never compromise on quality. Every product meets rigorous standards before it reaches our clients.

Sustainability

We invest in green technologies and continuously reduce our environmental impact.

Customer First

Your success is our success. Exceptional service, timely delivery, and competitive pricing every time.

Innovation

Constantly researching and developing new solutions to meet the evolving demands of industry.

Integrity

Honest, transparent dealings with every client, supplier, and partner — always.

Global Reach

Local expertise backed by international sourcing networks for comprehensive chemical supply.
